since_last: 32% of 84 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +1.35%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 32% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.59% · BTC -0.90% · Gold +0.29% · Nasdaq100 -2.13%. 32% of 84 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +1.35%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +1.35%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -5.79%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TER is the standout at -11.75%
cards.body: Leaders: WDAY +4.80%, NET +4.64%, INTU +3.52%, ADBE +2.99%, SAP +2.88%. Laggards: TER -11.75%, INTC -10.10%, AMBA -10.05%, MRVL -9.58%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -6.06% at $150.7
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -6.06% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
